 138w
The Sambuokan Festival , a vibrant celebration of Mati City's culture, industries and tradition, is an event you won't want to miss. Now on its 23rd year, this lively celebration unites the diverse communities of this bustling city through colorful parades, trade fairs, cultural activities, and traditional games. Sambuokan's highlight is the much-awaited street dance parade that beautifully showcases Mati's rich cultural heritage.

Congratulations to Balangay City High Performing Arts of the City of Mati National High School - CMNHS for winning this year's grand prize!

Join the Matinians as they continue to celebrate the Sambuokan until today, October 27!

#SambuokanFestival2023

#DiversityIsOurBeauty
